Name: Average time from Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE to Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Total time between Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE and Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Minimum time it takes Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE after the execution of Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Average time for Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE grouped by case:BudgetNumber
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE' and the end of case grouped by the last value of case:BudgetNumber

Name: Time from Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE to Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER in cases where rejection occurs
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER'

Name: Average time between Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE and Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER in variants that include pre-approval
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER'

Name: Total resolution time of Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE in cases that eventually lead to Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER'

Name: Minimum time from Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE to Request Payment in successful variants without rejections
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Request Payment'

Name: Average waiting time to the Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE after Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Time of Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE compared to the time of Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE in variants containing multiple save-submit cycles
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Elapsed time between Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE and Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE in rejection loops involving pre-approver
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Average time it takes Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER after the execution of Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE in non-rejected cases
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER'

Name: Total time from Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE to Payment Handled in variants that bypass pre-approver rejection
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Payment Handled'

Name: Minimum time for Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE in cases that later result in Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER versus those that do not
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE and the end of the case

Name: Time until Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE since the Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE, specifically in variants with repeated submissions after pre-approver rejection
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE'
